word: H4174 - מֹורָד - môwrâd - mo-rawd' - Going down

sections.paragraph:
Original: מורד

Transliteration: môrâd

Phonetic: mo-rawd'

BDB Definition:

  1. descent, slope, steep place, hanging work, bevelled work
    1. descent
    2. hanging work

Origin: from H3381

TWOT entry: 909a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
